_meta.source: appointments -> patient.lead_id -> lead.utm_source/origin/gclid (Screening Calls, offline clinics)
_meta.note: Per clinic/week: BOOKINGS split by acquisition channel, each with outcome counts. 99.95% of booked patients link to a lead; ~95% have utm_source. This is the source of bookings, NOT all leads (clinic-level lead-source for non-bookers is unavailable).
